title: dioscorea listeri
intro: Dioscorea listeri, also known as Listea, is a plant species that belongs to the yam family, Dioscoreaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dioscorea listeri include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, improve blood circulation, and provide relief from arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. Dioscorea listeri can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
